description: Small RAG evaluation seed set for EduMate demo and regression checks.

cases.question: Summarize the Taylor formula notes.
cases.notes: Basic retrieval and grounded answer case for calculus PDF notes.

cases.question: Explain the formula in standard LaTeX if the source text supports it.
cases.notes: Formula answers should preserve supported formulas and avoid invented LaTeX.

cases.question: What does this document say about quantum banana economics?
cases.notes: Out-of-context questions should not fabricate an answer.
